title: Authority
description: A governmental or administrative body responsible for planning, regulating, and overseeing transport services within a jurisdiction.

jurisdiction.description: Geographic or administrative jurisdiction of this authority

regulatoryScope.description: Scope of regulatory powers (e.g. national, regional, local)

categories.description: Service categories offered by the provider

locations.description: Locations where the provider offers services

items.description: Items available for discovery from this provider

fulfillments.description: Fulfillment options offered by this provider
